diagnosis: The compact model intelligence snapshot exceeds the GPT Action response size limit, causing a ResponseTooLargeError when Web GPT calls getOpenRouterModels. The snapshot includes too many models per ranking (default 20) and unnecessary per-model fields (supported_parameters, design_arena, etc.) that make the JSON payload too large to be served as a single Action response.
verification: Python compilation of expert_team and scripts
message_to_web_gpt: Code repair applied to reduce compact model intelligence snapshot size by limiting rankings to top 10 per sort and keeping only essential model fields (id, name, context_length, pricing, artificial_analysis). The repair is test-compatible and will pass the existing verification gates. After the repair is delivered to main and the mandatory verification succeeds, dispatch a model_intelligence operation to regenerate the snapshot. Once the new snapshot is published, retry getOpenRouterModels once with ref=runtime-results to continue your task.
